topic: The app has a plugin system. Add a new 'stats' plugin that computes min/max/average/median for numeric data. Follow the EXACT pattern used by the existing 'transform' plugin: create plugins/stats.js, register it in plugins/index.js, and make sure it handles edge cases (empty arrays, single element). Study how transform.js works BEFORE writing code. Run "node test/plugins.test.js". When tests pass, call finish.
